---
author: Pranav
execute: 
    freeze: true
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: [serif,custom.scss]
        slide-number: true
        css: custom.css
        transition: slide
        transition-speed: default
        chalkboard: true
        margin: 0.1
---

# Wiper Hose Routing - Pyelastica Simulation

## Properties

Density = 1.230 g/cm^3^ (Assuming as Natural Rubber)

Young's Modulus = 3.605 MPa

Shear Modulus = 1.209 MPa

Poisson's Ratio = 0.49

Radius = 2.43 mm (Assuming Equivalent Mass)

No. of Elements = 100

## Position 1{.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w1 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w1e >}}
:::
::::

## Position 2{.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w2 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w2e >}}
:::
::::

## Position 3{.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w3 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w3e >}}
:::
::::

## Position 4{.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w4 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w4e >}}
:::
::::

## Position 5{.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w5 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#w5e >}}
:::
::::

## Position X - New Coord Sys. {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#wnew >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#wnewe >}}
:::
::::

## Error Metrics {.smaller style="text-align: center; font-size: 75%;"}

<div>
<style scoped>
    .dataframe tbody tr th:only-of-type {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .dataframe tbody tr th {
        vertical-align: top;
    }

    .dataframe thead th {
        text-align: right;
    }
</style>
<table border="1" class="dataframe">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: right;">
      <th></th>
      <th>Position</th>
      <th>Length - Prototype</th>
      <th>MD Error - Simulation</th>
      <th>Length Error - Simulation</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <th>0</th>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>163.633259</td>
      <td>54.931</td>
      <td>-0.239728</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th>1</th>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>163.433579</td>
      <td>54.921</td>
      <td>-0.235556</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th>2</th>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>163.42104</td>
      <td>52.379</td>
      <td>-0.235076</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th>3</th>
      <td>4.0</td>
      <td>163.685862</td>
      <td>9.745</td>
      <td>-0.242399</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th>4</th>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>163.298704</td>
      <td>39.859</td>
      <td>-0.188407</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th>5</th>
      <td>New coord</td>
      <td>163.30062</td>
      <td>9.988</td>
      <td>-0.104703</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
</div>

::: {style="font-size: 70%; text-align: right;"}
***^Units: mm***
:::
